Subparagraph.Text: all reductions and increases referred to in paragraphs 25(10)(a) and (b), respectively, for all impairments and reversals in respect of the asset that occurred prior to the particular impairment loss or reversal,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: in the case of a particular impairment loss, the reduction referred to in paragraph 25(10)(a) in respect of the particular impairment loss, and

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: in the case of a particular reversal, the increase referred to in paragraph 25(10)(b) in respect of the particular reversal; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: on the basis that the amount of the particular impairment loss or reversal, as the case may be, is deemed to be equal to the absolute value of the difference between

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the carrying value determined under paragraph (a), and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the carrying value that would be determined under paragraph (a) if that paragraph were read without reference to its subparagraphs (ii) and (iii).

Subsection.Text: Subsection (1) applies to fiscal years of a qualifying MNE group that begin on or after December 31, 2023.

Subsection 22(2) of the Act is amended by striking out √¢¬Ä¬úand√¢¬Ä¬ù at the end of paragraph (c), by adding √¢¬Ä¬úand√¢¬Ä¬ù at the end of paragraph (d) and by adding the following after paragraph (d):

Paragraph.Label: (e)

Subsection.Text: Subsection 24(5) of the Act is replaced by the following:

The specified jurisdictional effective tax rate of a particular entity located in a particular jurisdiction for a fiscal year, in respect of another entity (referred to in this subsection as the √¢¬Ä¬úparent entity√¢¬Ä¬ù) that is a constituent entity of an MNE group, that holds √¢¬Ä¬î directly or indirectly √¢¬Ä¬î an ownership interest in the particular entity, and that has a share of the particular entity√¢¬Ä¬ôs income attributed to it under a blended controlled foreign company tax regime of the jurisdiction in which the parent entity is located, is

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: if the particular entity is a constituent entity of, or joint venture entity in respect of, the MNE group (referred to in this subsection as an √¢¬Ä¬úin-scope entity√¢¬Ä¬ù), and neither its top-up amount for the fiscal year nor the top-up percentage that is applied in computing that top-up amount is deemed to be nil under any provision of this Act, the rate that would be the effective tax rate determined under this Act and that would be applied in computing the particular entity√¢¬Ä¬ôs top-up amount for the fiscal year if the jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes of the MNE group for the particular jurisdiction were

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: calculated without reference to any covered taxes imposed under a controlled foreign company tax regime for the fiscal year, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: increased by the total of all amounts each of which is an amount of tax payable

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: under the qualified domestic minimum top-up tax of the particular jurisdiction for the fiscal year in respect of the particular entity, or any other in-scope entity of the MNE group whose equivalent of the domestic top-up amount under the qualified domestic minimum top-up tax is computed applying the same effective tax rate as is used to compute the domestic top-up amount equivalent of the particular entity, and

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: in respect of which the blended controlled foreign company tax regime allows a foreign tax credit on the same terms as any creditable covered tax;

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if the particular entity is an in-scope entity of the MNE group, and either its top-up amount or the top-up percentage that is applied in computing its top-up amount is deemed to be nil under a provision of this Act for the fiscal year,

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: in cases where the top-up amount of the particular entity is deemed to be nil under section 47, the rate that is or would be, if it were required to be determined, the simplified effective tax rate under subsection 47(5) in respect of the particular entity,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: in cases where the top-up amount of the particular entity is deemed to be nil under section 44, the rate that would be the effective tax rate, determined under the particular jurisdiction√¢¬Ä¬ôs qualified domestic minimum top-up tax, that is applied in computing the equivalent of the domestic top-up amount of the particular entity under that qualified domestic minimum top-up tax if all tax amounts that satisfy the following conditions were included in determining that effective tax rate:

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: the tax amount is payable under the qualified domestic minimum top-up tax for the fiscal year in respect of the particular entity, or any other in-scope entity of the MNE group whose domestic top-up amount equivalent is computed applying the same effective tax rate as is used to compute the domestic top-up amount equivalent of the particular entity, and

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: the blended controlled foreign company tax regime allows a foreign tax credit for the tax amount on the same terms as any creditable covered tax, and

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: in cases where the top-up amount of the particular entity or the top-up percentage that is applied in computing its top-up amount is deemed to be nil under any provision of this Act other than section 44 or 47, the rate that would be the simplified effective tax rate determined under subsection 47(5) in respect of the particular entity if that rate were required to be determined and the references in the definition profit (loss) before income tax in subsection 47(1) to √¢¬Ä¬úqualified country-by-country report√¢¬Ä¬ù and √¢¬Ä¬úcountry-by-country report√¢¬Ä¬ù were read as references to √¢¬Ä¬úqualified financial statements√¢¬Ä¬ù; or

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: if the particular entity is not an in-scope entity of the MNE group,

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: in cases where the top-up amounts of all the in-scope entities of the MNE group located in the particular jurisdiction for the fiscal year are computed applying the same effective tax rate, that rate,

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: in cases where the top-up amounts of one or more in-scope entities of the MNE group located in the particular jurisdiction for the fiscal year are computed applying an effective tax rate that is different from the effective tax rate applied in computing the top-up amount of any other of those in-scope entities, the effective tax rate that is applied in computing the top-up amounts of the subgroup of those in-scope entities in respect of which the parent entity has the greatest aggregate amount of income attributed to it under the blended controlled foreign company tax regime, and

Subparagraph.Label: (iii)
Subparagraph.Text: in any other case, the rate that would be the effective tax rate of the MNE group for the particular jurisdiction for the fiscal year if

Clause.Label: (A)
Clause.Text: all of the entities located in the particular jurisdiction in which the parent entity holds √¢¬Ä¬î directly or indirectly √¢¬Ä¬î an ownership interest, and in respect of which the parent entity has income attributed to it under the blended controlled foreign company tax regime, were deemed to be standard constituent entities,

Clause.Label: (B)
Clause.Text: the effective tax rate were computed using the aggregate income and taxes recorded in the financial accounts of those entities instead of net GloBE income and jurisdictional adjusted covered taxes, respectively, and

Clause.Label: (C)
Clause.Text: the amount determined for B in paragraph 29(1)(b) were deemed to be nil.

Subsection.Text: The following rules apply for the purposes of allocating amounts in respect of covered taxes from a constituent entity-owner to a constituent entity (referred to in this subsection as the √¢¬Ä¬úrelevant entity√¢¬Ä¬ù) of an MNE group that is a hybrid entity in relation to the constituent entity-owner or that is a flow-through entity to which financial accounting income is allocated because paragraph 17(6)(c) applies in respect of the constituent entity-owner√¢¬Ä¬ôs ownership interest in the flow-through entity:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: subject to paragraph (b), an amount in respect of covered taxes recorded in the financial accounts of the constituent entity-owner for a fiscal year is allocated from the constituent entity-owner to the relevant entity to the extent the covered taxes are in respect of income of the relevant entity; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if the covered taxes are, in whole or in part, in respect of passive income of the relevant entity, the amount to be allocated from the constituent entity-owner to the relevant entity under paragraph (a), in respect of the particular portion of the covered taxes that are in respect of the relevant entity√¢¬Ä¬ôs passive income, must not exceed the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the amount of the relevant entity√¢¬Ä¬ôs passive income that is included in computing the covered taxes of the constituent entity-owner under the fiscal transparency rule in the jurisdiction where the constituent entity-owner is located, and
is the top-up percentage of the MNE group for the jurisdiction where the relevant entity is located, determined without regard to the particular portion of the covered taxes.

Subsection.Text: Section 24 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (6):
Despite any other provision of this Act, if the filing constituent entity of an MNE group elects in respect of a jurisdiction, the following rules apply:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: any deferred tax expense in respect of covered taxes that would, in the absence of this subsection, be available for allocation from a constituent entity of the MNE group located in the jurisdiction to another entity or a permanent establishment under subsection (1), (4), (5) or (6) in a fiscal year for which the election is in effect, shall be deemed to be nil; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the election is a five-year election.

Subsection.Text: Section 25 of the Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (6):

The filing constituent entity of an MNE group may elect to not include any increases in the amount of a deferred tax liability, or aggregation of deferred tax liabilities, in determining the total deferred tax adjustment amount of a constituent entity of the MNE group for the fiscal year in which the election is made and any subsequent year prior to the revocation year of the election, and the election is a five-year election.

Subsection.MarginalNote: GloBE deferred tax assets and deferred tax liabilities
Subsection.Text: If, due to any provision of this Part that is applicable in computing the GloBE income or loss of a constituent entity for a fiscal year, the carrying value (referred to in this subsection as the √¢¬Ä¬úGloBE carrying value√¢¬Ä¬ù) of an asset or liability differs from the carrying value (referred to in this section as the √¢¬Ä¬úaccounting carrying value√¢¬Ä¬ù) recorded in the financial accounts of the constituent entity, in applying this section for the fiscal year, the deferred tax asset or liability, and the deferred tax expense, recorded in the financial accounts of the constituent entity at any time are deemed to be the deferred tax asset or liability (referred to in this section as the √¢¬Ä¬úGloBE deferred tax asset√¢¬Ä¬ù or √¢¬Ä¬úGloBE deferred tax liability√¢¬Ä¬ù, respectively) and deferred tax expense that would be so recorded at that time, in accordance with the accounting standard used in computing the constituent entity√¢¬Ä¬ôs financial accounting income, if they were determined by reference to the GloBE carrying value of the asset or liability, adjusted in accordance with the following rules (referred to in this section as the √¢¬Ä¬úadjusted GloBE carrying value√¢¬Ä¬ù):

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the GloBE carrying value is to be adjusted for capitalized expenditures, amortization and depreciation; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: in determining the GloBE carrying value of an asset, no impairments or reversals of impairment losses in respect of the asset are to be taken into account.

Subsection.Text: Subsection (10) applies in respect of an asset if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the asset is subject to an impairment or an impairment loss in respect of the asset is reversed; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the accounting carrying value of the asset after the impairment or before the reversal (referred to in subsection (10) as the √¢¬Ä¬úimpaired accounting carrying value√¢¬Ä¬ù) is less than the adjusted GloBE carrying value of the asset.

Subsection.Text: Despite paragraph (8)(b), if this subsection applies in respect of an asset, in applying this section, any GloBE deferred tax asset or GloBE deferred tax liability and deferred tax expense otherwise determined in accordance with subsection (8) are to be adjusted on the basis that the adjusted GloBE carrying value were, in accordance with the accounting standard used in computing the constituent entity√¢¬Ä¬ôs financial accounting income,

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: in the case of an impairment, reduced to match the impaired accounting carrying value; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: in the case of a reversal of an impairment loss, increased to an amount equal to the lesser of

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the asset√¢¬Ä¬ôs adjusted GloBE carrying value, and

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the asset√¢¬Ä¬ôs accounting carrying value after the reversal.

Section.Text: The top-up amount of each constituent entity of, and each joint venture entity in respect of, an MNE group is deemed to be nil for a fiscal year if

Subsection.Text: Subsections (1) to (5) apply to fiscal years of a qualifying MNE group that begin on or after December 31, 2023.
The Act is amended by adding the following after section 47:

If the filing constituent entity of an MNE group elects the transitional UTPR safe harbour for the jurisdiction where the ultimate parent entity of the MNE group is located (referred to in this subsection as the √¢¬Ä¬úUPE jurisdiction√¢¬Ä¬ù) for a fiscal year, the top-up amount of each constituent entity of, and each joint venture entity in respect of, the MNE group that is located in the UPE jurisdiction for the year is deemed to be nil for the purpose of computing the total UTPR top-up amount (as defined in section 49.5) of the MNE group for the fiscal year, if

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the corporate income tax rate of the UPE jurisdiction for the fiscal year is equal to or greater than 20%; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the fiscal year

Subparagraph.Label: (i)

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: is not longer than 12 months.

Subsection.Text: For the purposes of paragraph (1)(a),

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the corporate income tax rate of a jurisdiction is the nominal statutory tax rate generally imposed by the jurisdiction on qualifying MNE groups on a comprehensive measure of income; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: if one or more subnational jurisdictions within the jurisdiction also impose a corporate income tax, subnational tax rates may be taken into account in determining the rate under paragraph (a) if those taxes are structured so that in the case of each subnational jurisdiction within the jurisdiction, the combined nominal statutory tax rate generally applicable to qualifying MNE groups on a comprehensive measure of income is equal to or greater than 20%.
